summary: Implemented full fingerprint system per plan: (1) default_fingerprint.json with vendor-grouped GPUs — no more duplicate Vendor strings, each vendor (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel/Apple/Mesa) maps to a list of renderers; (2) WebGLTemplate model changed from flat List<WebGLGpuCandidate> to Dictionary<string,List<string>> VendorGPUs; (3) FingerprintService updated to pick vendor first then renderer from that vendor — guarantees Vendor/Renderer consistency; (4) All 7 plan todos completed: JSON, model, service, dispatcher, ProfileCreateRequest, all tabs getValues(), CreateProfileModal wiring, build verified 0 errors.
current_status: All 7 todos complete. Build succeeded 0 warnings. DuckGo ready to test Create Profile flow with backend fingerprint generation.
